d6_marker: marked D6 Coxeter-polarity d20 selector; generator basis fixed by the derived A0-A5 relator-profile rule
formula: For each listed base-image tuple, reconstruct the unique permutation of the 2576 dodecads preserving all coherent relation labels. The base-image tuples are derived from the regular ordered-pair orbital and the A0-A5 relator profile, not read as a marker seed.
